THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANCHICK, FOLA K. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 285 TURK STREET #502, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL JUN-21-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DFT VACATES ON/BEFORE 6/21/96 AT 5PM, PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENT. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLTF MAY SEEK JUDGMNT UPON DECLARATION FOR POSS & $1730 BACK RENT. PLTF TO RETAIN DEFT'S $200 CLEANING DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATNYS FEES & COSTS. NO FURTHER STAYS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVIN / ZEMEL INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT TANCHICK, FOLA K. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
